leadText: Obsidian Falls (Japanese: 黒曜の滝 Obsidian Falls) is an area located in the eastern portion of the Obsidian Fieldlands in Hisui. The upper portion of the Obsidian Falls can be used to reach The Heartwood. Oreburrow Tunnel runs through the north and south end of the mountain from which the waterfall comes from. It is south of Grueling Grove.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Obsidian Falls is a large waterfall located at the bend of the river that runs north to south in the eastern part of the fieldlands. Small islands with items are located around the base of the waterfall and the adjacent cliff shorelines, which can be accessed with Basculegion . At the peak of the waterfall, ore deposits scatter the surrounding area. The land at the top of the waterfall generally slopes downward, with some parts flattening horizontally.
